evidence.framing: Agy/Gemini 3.1 Pro High APPROVE: the module cleanly integrates Christian-heritage framing for winter and Easter-cycle material and rejects decorative or superstition framing.
evidence.pedagogy: The lesson builds a C1+ seminar method around source, genre, performance, poetics, proof limits, and bridge to written culture; activities reinforce motif, sequencing, comparison, and essay response.
evidence.quote_integrity: Two hosted public readings are used through public ukrlib.com.ua source URLs, and local scans found no internal corpus or chunk IDs in learner-facing M02 surfaces.
evidence.review: Independent read-only Agy/Gemini 3.1 Pro High review returned APPROVE with no blockers after reviewing pasted current file contents.
evidence.source_hygiene: Resources and reading frontmatter use public URLs only; the module keeps source limits visible and does not expose service identifiers.
